text: Marco — Whitmore wedding, final headcount came in at 187 not 192. Becca flagged it this morning before kickoff. Does that affect the family-style setup we locked?
Yeah, actually helps — we were tight on the risotto station. 187 is fine, no staffing changes.
Good. Bride also texted asking for a gluten-free option on the passed apps. Can you add something without blowing up the flow?
Prosciutto-wrapped melon is already GF, I'll just make sure it's labeled. No extra cost.
Perfect. I'll tell Becca it's handled. See you Thursday for the venue walkthrough.
